title: heberdenia excelsa
intro: Heberdenia excelsa is a plant species native to Australia, commonly known as the stinkwood tree or stinkwood. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Heberdenia excelsa include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Heberdenia excelsa is often prepared as a tincture or infused into oil for topical use, or made into a tea for internal consumption, although its preparation and use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
